ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the athlete */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "profession" TEXT /* Profession of the athlete */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the athlete */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the athlete */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the athlete */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team or organization the athlete represents */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach assigned to the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., triathlon, marathon) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the event */,
  "event_format" TEXT /* Format of the event */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money for the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "overall_rank" INTEGER /* Overall rank of the athlete in the event */,
  "swim_time" TEXT /* Swim time of the athlete */,
  "bike_time" TEXT /* Bike time of the athlete */,
  "run_time" TEXT /* Run time of the athlete */,
  "overall_time" TEXT /* Overall time of the athlete */,
  "penalty_time" TEXT /* Any penalty time added to the athlete's overall time */,
  "disqualified" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the athlete was disqualified from the event */,
  "did_not_finish" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the athlete did not finish the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the division */,
  "profession" TEXT /* Profession of the division */,
  "division_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the division */,
  "division_type" TEXT /* Type of division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_divisions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "schedule_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the schedule */,
  "schedule_type" TEXT /* Type of schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedules_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the registration */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the division */,
  "ranking_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the ranking */,
  "ranking_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES event_divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., athlete, event organizer, administrator) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being measured (e.g., finish time, pace) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
column_names: Team or organization the athlete represents
ID of the coach assigned to the athlete
Total prize money for the event
Overall rank of the athlete in the event
Any penalty time added to the athlete's overall time
Flag indicating if the athlete was disqualified from the event
Flag indicating if the athlete did not finish the event
Rank of the athlete in the division
Role of the user (e.g., athlete, event organizer, administrator)
Metric being measured (e.g., finish time, pace)
